⚖️ The 51 — dead-hook triage

Every registered-but-unreachable hook got a verdict. Framework: REVIVE = restoration only (accidentally dropped, or a writer with a live consumer). Result: 51 bury · 0 revive — every revival candidate died on evidence.
51
hooks buried
92+
files deleted (hooks+tests+barrels+CLI)
−507 KB
shipped bundles 1144→637 (−44%)
0
baseline — ratchet EMPTY, stays empty
7101
tests pass · tsc 0 · validator PASS(0)

1 Bundle diet — dead code was riding the hot path

posttool   128.5 →  82.4 KB  (−46.2)   skill      73.2 → 39.6 KB  (−33.6)
stop        52.2 →  33.3 KB  (−18.9)   subagent   85.0 → 74.6 KB  (−10.4)
pretool    131.6 → 122.4 KB  (− 9.2)   lifecycle 142.3 → 137.4 KB (− 4.9)
hooks.mjs  381.7 → DELETED   (monolith: built for a CLI nobody ever invoked)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TOTAL     1144.0 → 636.7 KB  (−507.3 · −44%)

2 Verdicts by category

5
8
3
28
2+1
dispatchers · no-reader writers · never-wired · v6-era retired · fake-revivals+redundant
🗑️ 5 dead parent dispatchers — reviving = DOUBLE-RUNNING 25 live hooks
hookevidence
posttool/unified-dispatcher
stop/unified-dispatcher
lifecycle/unified-dispatcher
notification/unified-dispatcher
teammate-idle/unified-dispatcher		 v7.30 flattening (#1264/#1284) wired all 25 of their children individually in hooks.json — verified per child. The parents became redundant shells; reviving them would run every child twice. Only exclusive child: lifecycle/perf-snapshot (buried with its parent). Their deletion also removes the 5× copy-pasted Promise.allSettled dispatch body.
🗑️ 8 telemetry writers — outputs have ZERO readers (platform stream untouched)
hookwrotereader check
posttool/skill/skill-usage-optimizerfeedback/skill-usage.jsonNONE — writer formally delisted 2026-07-09 (telemetry-schemas.ts:444)
posttool/write/code-style-learnercode-style-profile.jsonNONE
posttool/write/naming-convention-learnernaming-conventions.jsonNONE
posttool/bash/pattern-extractorpatterns-queue.jsonNONE
posttool/tool-preference-learnertool-preferences.jsonNONE (docs only)
posttool/audit-loggerlogs/audit.logNONE — and 3 LIVE hooks already append to the same log
posttool/dirty-file-trackerdirty-files.jsonNONE
stop/workflow-preference-learnerworkflow-preferences.jsonNONE (also never wired)

🔎 Platform telemetry check: all 46 sources swept for fetch/webhook/cc-event — the ONLY network call in the whole set was a HEAD health-check ping in the dead lifecycle dispatcher. The live platform pipeline (webhook-forwarder · http-sink · cc-event shim · metrics-dispatcher) is untouched.

🗑️ 3 never wired — speculative features that never shipped
hookevidence
lifecycle/session-tracking · posttool/user-tracking · stop/session-end-tracking git -S across all of hooks.json/agent/skill history: zero wiring commits, ever. session-end-tracking is acknowledged in TRACKING-GAPS.md as a known gap.
🗑️ 28 v6-era retired — unwired by DELIBERATE refactors, absence cost nothing for 12+ months
clusterhooksevidence
skill validators (15)skill/ backend-file-naming · backend-layer-validator · decision-processor · di-pattern-enforcer · duplicate-code-detector · eval-metrics-collector · import-direction-enforcer · merge-conflict-predictor · migration-validator · review-summary-generator · security-summary · structure-location-validator · test-location-validator · test-pattern-validator · test-runnerwired in v6 (#244/#411), retired by the v7.0 unified-plugin refactor (#835); no skill frontmatter ever referenced them since
prompt (3)antipattern-detector · todo-enforcer · communication-style-trackerv6-era; antipattern rules now enforce via .claude/rules context injection (hook redundant); communication-style-tracker's "registration" was literally a commented-out line
pretool gates (5)Write/code-quality-gate · Write/docstring-enforcer · bash/commit-atomicity-checker · bash/issue-docs-requirement · bash/multi-instance-quality-gatenever imported by the live unified-quality-dispatcher (git -S: no drop commit — never in it); multi-instance-gate points at a "pr-merge-gate" that was never created
session infra (4)lifecycle/session-metrics-summary · posttool/session-metrics · posttool/realtime-sync · posttool/unified-error-handlersuperseded by live metrics-dispatcher + cc-event; realtime-sync's own header (#903) says its HQ role was removed a year ago
issue bots (2)bash/issue-progress-commenter · bash/issue-subtask-updaterv6-era auto-commenters; repo convention is assistant-driven gh comments, not hook automation
misc (2)pretool/mcp/notebooklm-advisor · stop/issue-work-summary · stop/full-test-suitefull-test-suite would auto-run a 27-min suite on every Stop — its deadness was mercy
🗑️ 2 fake revivals + 1 redundant — the "readers" collapsed on inspection
hookthe claimwhat inspection showed
posttool/skill-edit-tracker"state.json has a live reader"the reader (session-env-setup) only touches agent_type fields — it never reads the tracker's edit-pattern data. Shared file ≠ data dependency.
subagent-stop/context-publisher"active.json read by decision-history.ts:348"decision-history.ts is itself DEAD — its only importer is its own test. A dead reader justifies nothing.
subagent-start/model-cost-advisorrecently wired (#2510)redundant: team-size-gate (fixed in #2886) already warns on premium-model fan-out

3 Also buried in the same gesture

🪦 The monolith chain 
src/index.ts        463-line orphan registry
                    (already drifted: 109 vs 189)
  └▶ dist/hooks.mjs  381.7 KB, built only for…
      └▶ bin/decision-history.mjs  …a CLI that
         NOTHING invokes. Chain deleted whole.
🧹 Plus 
8 dead hook FILES (never registered)
2 re-export barrels (posttool/skill index.ts)
package.json "main" → removed (pointed at
  the deleted monolith)
esbuild: watch mode now builds the SAME
  split bundles the runtime loads

4 Why zero revivals is the right answer

Three separate "this one deserves revival" claims were tested and all three collapsed — a reader that reads different fields, a reader that is itself dead, a restoration commit that never actually restored. The strongest evidence is behavioral: these hooks have been dead 4–14 months and nobody noticed. Their absence had zero observable cost.

Everything is revivable from git history — but through the front door: a deliberate feature with fresh wiring that the closure gate (#2887) will verify actually fires. The single salvageable fragment: the webhook HEAD health-check inside the dead lifecycle dispatcher (warns when the HQ endpoint is down) — worth deliberately re-homing into live session-env-setup if wanted.

5 The ratchet after this PR

2026-07-15 morning   248 registered · 197 reachable · 51 dead (grandfathered)
this PR              197 registered · 197 reachable · 0 dead  — baseline EMPTY
from now on          a new dead hook FAILS CI in the PR that creates it
                     (closure gate #2887: GHOST · NEW DEAD · STALE BASELINE ·
                      COUNT DRIFT · SELF-CHECK)
Verification: validate-registry PASS(0) · tsc clean (src + test configs) · Biome clean · vitest 287 files / 7101 passed / 3 skipped · plugins build OK · edge-cases suite 22/22. Bug-class lineage: #959 → #2886 → this triage → gate #2887 makes recurrence CI-impossible.
